SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource

Interface FileOpener

public interface FileOpener
Interface for opening files and producing record batches.

A FileOpener is created by a FileSource with a specific schema and allocator already bound. When DataFusion needs to read a file, it calls open(PartitionedFile) with the file metadata.

Example: 

class TsvFileOpener implements FileOpener {
    private final Schema schema;
    private final BufferAllocator allocator;

    TsvFileOpener(Schema schema, BufferAllocator allocator) {
        this.schema = schema;
        this.allocator = allocator;
    }

    @Override
    public RecordBatchReader open(PartitionedFile file) {
        // Read file and parse into record batches using schema and allocator
    }
}
See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: FileOpener

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RecordBatchReader
    open(PartitionedFile file)
    Opens a file and returns a RecordBatchReader yielding batches.

  • Method Details

    • open

      RecordBatchReader open(PartitionedFile file)
      Opens a file and returns a RecordBatchReader yielding batches.

      Example: 

      FileOpener opener = source.createFileOpener(
    schema, allocator, scanConfig);
RecordBatchReader reader = opener.open(partitionedFile);
// Iterate over record batches from the reader
      Parameters:
      file - the partitioned file metadata including path, size, and optional byte range
      Returns:
      a reader that produces record batches
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: FileOpener::open
